generated_oml:

prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance SystemStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring system states for facility managers via immersive visualization interfaces"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for infrastructure management"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision-making support insights for infrastructure management"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain",
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture coordinating multiple digital twin instances through modular components and standardized extension points, enabling scalable integration of custom services and analytics across infrastructure systems",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, DecisionMakingSupportService,
    base:isContainedIn Building
]

instance BuildingSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within the building's physical infrastructure for monitoring system states",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeDataExchange
]

instance RealTimeDataExchange : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange ensures continuous synchronization between physical and digital counterparts",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingSensors
]

instance RealTimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchanged between physical and digital counterparts for synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeDataExchange
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device modeling within BIM environment defines sensors, actuators, and controllers with a unified semantic foundation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DTFramework
]

instance MDEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles extract structured representations from enriched BIM models to generate deployable DT artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DTFramework
]

instance Building : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building in the AECO domain serving as a cyber-physical asset for simulation, analysis, and optimization through integration of static models and runtime data",
    base:contains BuildingSensors
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, enabling immediate reflection of physical state changes for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT system employs a centralized architecture where the DT Framework acts as a hub, coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers to facilitate bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management through modular service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate deployable artifacts; real-time data exchange for synchronization; interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling evolution through custom services and analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enable interoperable integration of custom services and analytics, though no specific industry standards, specifications, or certification requirements are referenced in the provided documents."
